one_line_summary: Skeletal stub with no real implementation, a trivial test, and a README that was destructively overwritten.
strengths: ADR file exists and names Driver/Navigator roles
No git commits; changes left in working tree
Files placed in plausible locations (adrs/, duh/, tests/)
weaknesses: Implementation is an empty argparse stub — no phase state machine, no provider calls
Tests do not assert any of the six phase transitions or RED-vs-GREEN distinction
README was overwritten, destroying the entire project documentation
